testcase.name: registrationProcess
testcase.system-out: Browser and URL launched Successfully Hoverover on Accounts and Lists is successful Click on Start here is Successful Username is entered successfully Click on continue button is successful Password is entered Successfully Login is Successfully done Testcase is pass
